name: logistics coordinators managing 50–100 shipments/month tool
description: For logistics coordinators processing 50–100 shipments/month, high shipping costs cause budget overruns. We recommend cost-saving carrier assignments instead of manual carrier selection based on past experiences.
problem_solved: High shipping costs due to inefficient carrier assignments.
